about.description: Founded in 2018, KeyPro was born out of frustration with traditional dealer lead times and rigid workshop schedules. We envisioned a world where elite technical skill could be dispatched on-demand.

faq.title: Got Questions?
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our specialized automotive technical services.

q1.question: Do you come to my location if I've lost all my keys?
q1.answer: Yes, we are a fully mobile service. We can travel to your home, workplace, or the roadside. We have all the necessary equipment in our vans to cut and program a brand new key from scratch on-site.

q2.question: Which car brands do you support?
q2.answer: We specialize in premium European brands including BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Audi, Volkswagen, Porsche, and Land Rover. However, we also support most major manufacturers like Peugeot, Renault, Ford, and various Japanese brands.

q3.question: How long does a diagnostic scan take?
q3.answer: A standard full system scan typically takes between 30 to 45 minutes. This includes a complete report of all electronic modules, clearing of intermittent fault codes, and a professional consultation on any existing issues.

q4.question: Are your keys and modules original parts?
q4.answer: We offer both OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturer) and high-quality aftermarket alternatives. All our parts are strictly tested and come with a technical warranty to match or exceed factory standards.

q5.question: Can you fix immobilizer issues that the dealer says require a full ECU replacement?
q5.answer: Often, yes. Many immobilizer faults are software-based synchronization errors. While dealers prefer to replace entire modules, we have the binary tools to repair the data inside the modules, potentially saving you thousands.

q6.question: What information do I need to provide for a quote?
q6.answer: To give an accurate quote, we need the vehicle make, model, year, and its VIN (Vehicle Identification Number) if possible. For key issues, please specify if it's a backup key or if all keys are lost.
